findings.message: httpx is a reputable, actively maintained HTTP client (Encode/Tom Christie) with good supply-chain hygiene; the upper bound <1.0 is appropriate to guard against breaking changes in the upcoming stable release.

httpx already appears in [dependency-groups].dev at >=0.28, but the new production constraint allows >=0.27. In practice uv/pip will resolve the intersection, but the floor mismatch could cause confusion — consider aligning the production floor to >=0.28 to match dev.
findings.suggestion: Change to "httpx>=0.28,<1.0" to keep the production floor consistent with the dev group.
